'''Paro Lanto''' was a [[Sector/Legends|Sector]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rule. Lanto sent [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Osted Alater]] to investigate [[Planetary Safaris Inc.]]'s claim that the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabels]] were a violent and dangerous species that needed to be eliminated under the [[Dangerous Species Act]].
